How It Works

Your Journey to Self-Discovery

Three simple steps to unlock the ancient wisdom encoded in your birth chart

01

Enter Your Birth Details

Share your birth date, time, and location. Our system uses traditional Chinese metaphysics to calculate your unique elemental blueprint.

02

Receive Your Analysis

Discover your Day Master element, natural strengths, and current luck cycle. Get personalized insights about your career, relationships, and timing.

03

Align With Your Energy

Use your personalized recommendations to make better decisions, optimize your space with Feng Shui, and flow with life's natural rhythms.

What You'll Discover

Insights for Every Area of Life

Your BaZi chart reveals patterns and potentials across career, relationships, health, and personal growth

Career Guidance

Discover your natural talents and the optimal timing for career moves, promotions, and new ventures.

Luck Cycle Timing

Understand your 10-year luck cycles and annual influences to make decisions at the right time.

Relationship Insights

Learn about your relationship patterns, compatibility dynamics, and how to nurture meaningful connections.

Feng Shui Alignment

Get personalized Feng Shui recommendations based on your element to optimize your living and workspace.

Personal Growth

Identify your inherent strengths and challenges to accelerate your personal development journey.

Compatibility Analysis

Compare charts with partners, colleagues, or friends to understand your natural dynamics.
